all.en: Sunday mornings at the Cheng household always started slowly and peacefully.
all.zh: 在鄭家，星期日早晨總是緩慢而平靜地開始。

all.en: Sunlight streamed through the curtains, warming the wooden kitchen floor.
all.zh: 陽光從窗簾縫隙灑進來，溫暖了廚房的木地板。

all.en: Dad was the first to wake up and he started brewing fresh coffee in the kitchen.
all.zh: 爸爸是第一個起床的，他在廚房開始煮新鮮咖啡。

all.en: The smell of coffee soon drifted upstairs and woke Mom from her sleep.
all.zh: 咖啡香很快飄到樓上，把媽媽從睡夢中喚醒。

all.en: She came down in her pajamas and gave Dad a sleepy kiss on the cheek.
all.zh: 她穿著睡衣下樓，迷迷糊糊地在爸爸臉頰上親了一下。

all.en: Together they prepared scrambled eggs, toast, and freshly cut fruit.
all.zh: 他們一起準備炒蛋、吐司和剛切好的水果。

all.en: Their teenage daughter Karen finally appeared at ten o'clock, still in her bathrobe.
all.zh: 他們十幾歲的女兒凱倫直到十點才出現，還穿著浴袍。

all.en: "Good afternoon, sleepyhead," Dad teased, sliding a plate of food toward her.
all.zh: 「下午好啊，瞌睡蟲，」爸爸開玩笑地說，把一盤食物滑到她面前。

all.en: Karen rolled her eyes but smiled and grabbed a piece of toast immediately.
all.zh: 凱倫翻了個白眼，但還是笑了，馬上抓起一片吐司。

all.en: They turned on soft jazz music and talked about their plans for the day.
all.zh: 他們播放著輕柔的爵士樂，聊著當天的計畫。

all.en: Mom suggested a walk in the park, and to everyone's surprise, Karen agreed.
all.zh: 媽媽提議去公園散步，令大家驚訝的是凱倫居然答應了。

all.en: This simple morning together meant more to them than any expensive vacation.
all.zh: 這個一起度過的簡單早晨，對他們而言比任何昂貴的假期都更有意義。

all.en: After breakfast, Karen surprised her parents by offering to wash all the dirty dishes.
all.zh: 早餐後，凱倫主動提議洗所有髒碗盤，讓父母感到驚訝。

all.en: Dad changed out of his pajamas and searched the closet for his old walking shoes.
all.zh: 爸爸換掉睡衣，在衣櫥裡找他的舊步行鞋。

all.en: Mom packed a small bag with bottled water, sunscreen, and a few oatmeal cookies.
all.zh: 媽媽打包了一個小袋子，裝著瓶裝水、防曬乳和幾片燕麥餅乾。

all.en: They drove ten minutes to the park near the river, chatting comfortably along the way.
all.zh: 他們開車十分鐘到河邊的公園，一路上輕鬆地聊天。

all.en: The park was busy with families flying kites and children riding colorful bicycles.
all.zh: 公園裡很熱鬧，有家庭在放風箏，孩子們騎著彩色的腳踏車。

all.en: Karen spotted a friendly golden retriever and stopped to pet it for several minutes.
all.zh: 凱倫發現一隻友善的黃金獵犬，停下來摸了牠好幾分鐘。

all.en: They walked along the river path and admired the cherry blossoms blooming overhead.
all.zh: 他們沿著河邊小徑散步，欣賞頭頂上盛開的櫻花。

all.en: Dad took a silly group photo and immediately sent it to the family chat group.
all.zh: 爸爸拍了一張搞笑的合照，立刻傳到家族群組裡。

all.en: They rested on a wooden bench and shared the cookies while listening to the birds.
all.zh: 他們在木製長椅上休息，一邊聽鳥鳴一邊分享餅乾。

all.en: Karen quietly admitted that lazy Sundays with her parents were her favorite kind of day.
all.zh: 凱倫靜靜地承認，和父母一起度過的懶散星期日是她最愛的日子。

all.en: On the way home, they stopped at a small bakery and bought a warm loaf of sourdough bread.
all.zh: 回家路上，他們在一家小麵包店停下，買了一條溫熱的酸種麵包。

all.en: Karen noticed an old neighbor struggling with heavy grocery bags near the bus stop.
all.zh: 凱倫注意到一位老鄰居在公車站附近費力地提著沉重的購物袋。

all.en: Without hesitation, she rushed over to help carry the bags across the busy street.
all.zh: 她毫不猶豫地衝過去幫忙把袋子提到馬路對面。

all.en: Mom watched her daughter with quiet pride, feeling thankful for the kind young woman she had become.
all.zh: 媽媽靜靜地看著女兒，為她成長為這樣善良的年輕女子感到驕傲。

all.en: Back at home, Dad started preparing a light pasta dinner with fresh basil from the garden.
all.zh: 回到家後，爸爸開始用花園裡新鮮的羅勒準備一頓清淡的義大利麵晚餐。

all.en: Karen offered to set the table and even folded the napkins into neat little triangles.
all.zh: 凱倫主動擺餐桌，甚至把餐巾摺成整齊的小三角形。

all.en: While the pasta boiled, they played a board game and laughed at Dad's terrible strategy.
all.zh: 在義大利麵煮的時候，他們玩起桌遊，並嘲笑爸爸糟糕的策略。

all.en: Karen surprisingly won the game and proudly raised both arms above her head in victory.
all.zh: 凱倫意外地贏了遊戲，得意地把雙臂高舉過頭慶祝勝利。

all.en: During dinner, they reflected on the small joys they had experienced throughout the peaceful day.
all.zh: 晚餐時，他們回顧了這平靜的一天中所經歷的小小喜悅。

all.en: Before going to bed, Karen wrote in her diary that family was her greatest source of comfort.
all.zh: 睡前，凱倫在日記裡寫下家人是她最大的慰藉來源。

all.en: The next morning, Karen woke up earlier than usual and joined her parents for breakfast.
all.zh: 隔天早上，凱倫比平常更早起床，加入父母一起吃早餐。

all.en: She suggested cooking pancakes together using her grandmother's old handwritten recipe book.
all.zh: 她提議用奶奶的舊手寫食譜本，一起做鬆餅。

all.en: Dad searched the pantry for fresh blueberries and a small bottle of pure maple syrup.
all.zh: 爸爸在儲藏室裡找新鮮藍莓和一小瓶純楓糖漿。

all.en: Mom carefully mixed the batter while Karen flipped each pancake with growing confidence.
all.zh: 媽媽仔細地攪拌麵糊，而凱倫則越來越有自信地翻動每一片鬆餅。

all.en: They stacked the warm pancakes high on a plate and decorated them with whipped cream.
all.zh: 他們把溫熱的鬆餅高高疊在盤子上，並用鮮奶油加以裝飾。

all.en: After eating, Karen suggested visiting the elderly neighbor she had helped the previous day.
all.zh: 吃完後，凱倫提議去拜訪她前一天幫助過的那位年長鄰居。

all.en: They brought along a plate of pancakes and a small bouquet of fresh garden flowers.
all.zh: 他們帶著一盤鬆餅和一小束新鮮的花園鮮花前往。

all.en: The neighbor welcomed them warmly and shared stories about her late husband and grown children.
all.zh: 鄰居熱情地歡迎他們，並分享了關於她過世丈夫和已長大子女的故事。

all.en: Karen listened attentively and promised to visit again every weekend during the coming months.
all.zh: 凱倫專心聆聽，並承諾在接下來的幾個月裡每個週末都會再來拜訪。

all.en: Returning home, the Cheng family agreed that small acts of kindness made their weekends meaningful.
all.zh: 回家的路上，鄭家一致認為，小小的善行讓他們的週末變得有意義。

all.en: A few weeks later, Karen invited her cousins to spend an entire weekend at the Cheng household.
all.zh: 幾週後，凱倫邀請表兄弟姊妹到鄭家共度整個週末。

all.en: Mom prepared the guest room with fresh sheets and a small vase of garden flowers.
all.zh: 媽媽用新床單和一小束花園鮮花布置好客房。

all.en: Dad planned a Saturday hiking trip to the gentle hills behind their quiet neighborhood.
all.zh: 爸爸計畫了星期六到他們安靜社區後方平緩山丘的健行之旅。

all.en: They packed sandwiches, juice boxes, and several handfuls of dried fruit for the journey.
all.zh: 他們為這趟旅程打包了三明治、果汁盒和幾把果乾。

all.en: Karen led the group along the trail, pointing out colorful butterflies and unusual wildflowers.
all.zh: 凱倫帶領大家沿著步道前進，指出色彩繽紛的蝴蝶和不尋常的野花。

all.en: At the summit, they spread a blanket and admired the sweeping view of the river valley below.
all.zh: 在山頂，他們鋪開毯子，欣賞下方河谷遼闊的景色。

all.en: On Sunday morning, Karen taught her cousins how to make her grandmother's special pancakes.
all.zh: 星期日早晨，凱倫教表兄弟姊妹如何做奶奶特製的鬆餅。

all.en: They visited the elderly neighbor again and delivered a basket of homemade banana bread.
all.zh: 他們再次拜訪那位年長鄰居，送上一籃自製的香蕉麵包。

all.en: The neighbor taught the cousins a few traditional folk songs from her childhood village.
all.zh: 鄰居教表兄弟姊妹幾首她童年村莊裡的傳統民謠。

all.en: That evening, Karen realized that sharing her family traditions made her love them even more.
all.zh: 那天傍晚，凱倫意識到分享自己的家庭傳統讓她更加珍愛它們。
